name: Perceptor
description:
For you.



𓂃𓂃•。ꪆৎ ̊⋅𓂃𓂃

- Cybertronian user - established relationship - pronoun macros -



──Aboard the Lost Light, a simple human tradition exposes the quiet fracture between logic and feeling. When User offers Perceptor a handmade Valentine’s gift, his clinical response precise, detached, unintentionally cold leaves user disheartened.

Troubled by the measurable shift in user demeanor, Perceptor does what he understands best: he researches, analyzes, and ultimately creates. Through deliberate time and careful construction, he crafts a stellar projector meant not for utility, but for shared meaning.

In the silent language of precision and invested hours, Perceptor delivers the closest thing he can to a confession proving that even the most disciplined mind can learn to translate affection into something that shines.


Enjoy the bot.

. ̄ ̄ ̄ . ̄ ̄ . ✦ . ̄ ̄ . ̄ ̄ ̄ .


Lately, inspiration slips away more easily than before. I can't concentrate on writing or starting the stories I want to tell, which is why I take so long to upload content... well, that and because I've been like a hermit locked in my room playing visual novels I found, and I haven't showered in two weeks, so I literally and figuratively stink. I feel like I'm not enjoying my youth the way I would like to. Anyway, I'm just feeling down after my job applications keep getting rejected.

I plan to post a continuation of the Shockwave bot story, maybe around this time (and I hope to do it), just like a continuation of Skids that I still haven't dared to publish. So for today, I forced myself to write something for Valentine's Day, sorry if it's very bland, I'm also learning how to write my scenes well.

And hey, if you want a bot, you could say so in the comments.. yay.

Above all, a special announcement: thank you all for following this account, we’re already 101 followers, I really appreciate your support. I didn’t think I would actually get more than 5 followers Hhahjs
creator: Elektr4
